input.story: My sister just had a baby. Family of 4. Dinners for two weeks would really help. No peanuts. Contactless after 5pm.
My friend is recovering from surgery and could use dinners for 10 days. She's vegetarian and lives alone. Please leave food at the door.
We need meals and groceries after the baby arrives. Family of 5, two adults and three kids. Gluten-free household. Prefer drop-offs between 6 and 7 PM.
My parents need meal drop-offs this week. Dad is diabetic, mom can't have shellfish. Family of 2. Lunch preferred.
Our neighbor's house had a fire. Family of 6. They need everything — meals, groceries, and any donations would help. No dietary restrictions that I know of.
A colleague lost her mother. She has 3 kids and could use takeout deliveries for the next week. She's kosher. Please be discreet.
My friend needs help with dinners for a while.

Setting up meals for my sister's family after her C-section. Family of 4 — two adults, two toddlers. They love soups and rice bowls. Avoid spicy food. Tree nut allergy and dairy-free. Contactless porch drop-off after 5:30 PM please. Mon/Wed/Fri dinners for 3 weeks.
